seoTitle: How to Set Up Brevo SMTP for Transactional Email
metaDescription: Configure Brevo's free SMTP relay for website contact forms, order confirmations, and password resets, including generating secure server keys.
intro: Broken contact forms, delayed order confirmations, or password reset emails landing in spam usually trace back to a poorly configured mail relay. Brevo's SMTP service provides a free way to route transactional email through a reliable cloud relay with proper domain authentication. This guide covers finding your credentials and generating a secure key.

steps.heading: Locate your master SMTP parameters
steps.body: Open your workspace panels to uncover the host name, active user login, and available port values needed to configure your SMTP relay.

steps.heading: Generate a secure SMTP key
steps.body: Create a unique, dedicated SMTP key rather than reusing your main account password, keeping your credentials isolated per integration.

steps.heading: Enter the settings into your website or app
steps.body: Plug the host, port, username, and generated key into your website's contact form plugin or application's mail configuration.

steps.heading: Complete DNS authentication
steps.body: Handle the DNS zone handshake authentication for your domain to improve deliverability of transactional messages.

steps.heading: Run a live delivery test
steps.body: Send a test transactional message through your configured SMTP relay to confirm it delivers correctly before relying on it in production.

faq.question: Is Brevo's SMTP relay free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, Brevo's free tier includes SMTP relay access for a set number of automated messages daily.

faq.question: Should I use my account password for SMTP?
faq.answer: No, generate a dedicated SMTP key instead of using your main account password to keep credentials isolated and secure.

faq.question: Why are my transactional emails landing in spam?
faq.answer: This is often related to incomplete domain authentication, so make sure your DNS records are properly configured.

faq.question: What port should I use for Brevo SMTP?
faq.answer: Brevo supports standard SMTP ports, and the exact value is listed in your workspace's SMTP settings panel.
